channel.title: Architecture on Senior Backend Architect
channel.description: Recent content in Architecture on Senior Backend Architect

item.title: Technical Whitepaper: Deterministic Computing
item.description: Deterministic Runtime Design under System Optimization and Extreme Constraints.

item.title: Technical Audit: Toyoko INN Performance & Security
item.description: External performance auditing of a massive reservation system (143.9B JPY scale), identifying 800M JPY in potential salvageable revenue through architectural optimization.

item.title: Deep Dive: Architectural Failures in a Fractionated RWA Protocol
item.description: A post-mortem of a P0 architectural audit in Tokyo, revealing how amateur engineering practices can lead to protocol-level insolvency in fractionated Real-World Asset protocols.

item.title: ETL Performance Optimization: 70s to 1.5s
item.description: Re-architecting a Spring Boot ETL pipeline to achieve 50x throughput gain using high-performance Batch Upserts and Strategy Patterns.
